productDisplayName: Puma Women Winning Diva Ballerina Black Casual Shoes
description: These ballerina flats from puma are both feminine and versatile. They feature mesh uppers with synthetic leather trims, graphic accents and a pink cushioned foot-bed. The rubber outsole adds extra grip making these shoes perfect for urban living.UpperSynthetic textured uppers with panel overlays and mesh at the toe region for comfort and durabilityFabric lining for enhanced comfortSlip on style for a snug and customised FitHeel cup for greater structure and stabilityCut out pattern on the lateral side for enhanced styleBrand name embossed on the collar and printed on the toe regionMidsoleCushioned foot-bed for all-day comfortPhylon midsole for lightweight comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with patterned grooves for greater gripPivot point with branding on the mid-foot for maximum tractionOutsole reinforced on the upper at the heelshoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
